page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Fit-hi-c is a tool for assigning statistical confidence estimates to chromosomal contact maps produced by genome architecture assays.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for assigning statistical confidence estimates to intra-chromosomal contact maps produced by genome-wide genome architecture assays such as Hi-C.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for assigning statistical confidence estimates to intra-chromosomal contact maps produced by genome-wide genome architecture assays such as Hi-C.
